title: ability to export images and files when the board is exported into excel or PDF

posts.author: johannesgeyer (Johannes Geyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Peter-Halloush

You can use the app DocExport PDF Generator to create a PDF in your own design including information from a board.

Many of our clients are using DocExport for inventory lists: a table with item information and image. Or also as a product/price list with images.
You can find some examples in our Template Gallery (Board Level Template).

Feel free to reach out to our support team, if you have any questions: Contact

posts.author: Flowtech (Flowtech Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can use create customized documents (like PDFs, invoices, quotes, reports, or contracts) directly from your monday.com data, you might want to check out DocCreate.

With DocCreate, you can:

Automatically generate a PDF from board data — including from a Workdoc-style layout

Attach the generated PDF to a File column — no need to download or re-upload manually

Email the PDF to external clients instantly using pre-configured templates

Fully customize the layout with logos, headers, footers, and page breaks

Embed images, data from connected boards, and subitems into your PDFs seamlessly

Here’s a quick demo to see it in action:
Watch Demo

And if you want to try it out, here’s the install link:
Install DocCreate
